name: frontier_arcade
description: Battle Arcade hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane) on the REAL wheel mechanic (FrontierManager, 2026-07-19): all three fights are MANAGER-OWNED - the dialog battle buttons are gone, replaced by 'Spin the wheel' (cobblemon-initiative frontier arcade spin, arms a WheelSlice condition: LEVEL 50/75/100 flatten, DOUBLES flip, PURSE x2/x3) and a take-the-fight button (frontier arcade fight 1|2|brain) that REFUSES without a spun stake ('No stake on the table'). The house spins once per fight: each beat spins (expect the [The Wheel] header + one of the six slice lines + the condition-armed rule line), re-opens the dialog, takes the fight. Win signal is the manager's '[Frontier] Purse paid: N CD' chat + the Java-granted defeat tag (trainers say NO win_line on manager fights; the old win-line prose now lives in their beaten entries) - the brain win additionally fires defeated_frontier_brain_arcade + frontier_arcade_cleared + the shipped frontier/hall_cleared chain ('A Frontier hall falls.' actionbar + seven-hall counter). Level-locked slices ride Cobblemon's clone-and-flatten (attrition-free) and DOUBLES needs two able mons - the 6x lv-100 wonder-Raikou team wins under every slice. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery: gate.champion lowers to royal_league_champion (content_compile line 205ff) - added in the preamble, stripped in cleanup. Site is the shipped RCT frontier cluster at y159 - the preamble asserts frontier_active (region_tick AABB) for the no-death safe-exhibition promise. A stale armed slice from an aborted prior run is harmless: every beat spins first, which overwrites it. KNOWN CAVEAT: the intermittent TBCS battle-init stall (and the rarer showdown engine wedge) means a win-wait timeout is almost certainly NOT a hall regression - the manager also prints 'The fight failed to take the floor' on a 100-tick capture timeout; re-run before filing (wedge recovery: blind rctapi maps then dev showdown revive).

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog from a prior scenario, then sweep a stale battle (stopbattle fires no event; the sleep lets TBCS liveness settle) --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep below + the 40b hall latches spawn Fritz/Suki/Dahlia if the world is fresh). Coordinate is 2b north of the shipped Arcade bench line (ch1 3782.5 / ch2 3788.5 at z2976.5, brain 3785.5 z2982.5) - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage. Armor stands excluded (TBCS + FrontierManager anchors), NPC bodies + pokemon excluded

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or the manager sets, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the three bodies persist (one_time challengers and gym_leader brains never despawn on win) --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup - later scenarios assume a fresh low-badge player
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses (no_defeated_arcade_challenger_* and no_frontier_arcade_cleared) after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared, and the region tick has painted the safe-exhibition tag --

steps.comment_: frontier/region_tick AABB - the trigger NuzlockeInit reads for the no-death exhibition

steps.comment: -- party reset: junk lv-5 parties from earlier scenarios stall TBCS battle init (verified live in wheat_war). Empty all six slots, then 6x lv-100 Raikou - a DOUBLES slice needs two able mons and level-locked slices are clone-and-flatten (attrition-free), so six covers every wheel outcome --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle). Holds under the wheel too: flattened to 50/75/100 the ability and item still carry.

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 — every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Gambler Fritz, the first table. Both manager buttons must render (their rendering IS the champion-gate assert; say[] rotates so buttons are the stable target). Spin first - the house spins once per fight --

steps.comment_: frontier arcade spin (as_player) + close - the wheel result lands in chat, so the button closes the dialog to let the player read it
the [The Wheel] header (Java FrontierManager.arcadeSpin: 'clatters... slows... lands on:')
one of the six WheelSlice announce lines - the slice is random, so this is an alternation over all of them

steps.wait_chat: The condition rides your NEXT arcade fight
steps.comment_: the armed-condition rule line - proves wheelArmed is set before the fight click
between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight); also the emitter boundary - the win window opens here, before the fight dispatch
frontier arcade fight 1 (as_player) + close - the manager consumes the armed slice, attaches the trainer, dispatches tbcs under the slice's format/lock
the fight button carries a close action now (unlike the old do:battle buttons) - assert it lands

the manager's win signal ('[Frontier] Purse paid: N CD' - N varies with PURSE x2/x3 slices, so no amount in the needle); trainers say NO win_line on manager fights. A timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the purse line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
Java-granted defeat tag (FrontierManager.onFightWon) - same tag the dialog gates always keyed on
battle teardown settle before the next dispatch

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Player Suki, the high-roller table. Fresh spin - the wheel spins once per fight --

steps.wait_chat: The condition rides your NEXT arcade fight

steps.comment_: between-fights heal + emitter boundary for the win window
frontier arcade fight 2 (as_player) + close
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the purse line lands
battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Arcade Star Dahlia. Her buttons gate all_tags on both challenger defeats - their rendering IS the ladder assert. Spin, then take the last table. Win chain (Java): defeated_frontier_brain_arcade + frontier_arcade_cleared tags -> frontier/hall_cleared ('A Frontier hall falls.' actionbar + counter) -> purse chat --

steps.wait_chat: The condition rides your NEXT arcade fight

steps.comment_: between-fights heal + emitter boundary for the win window
frontier arcade fight brain (as_player) + close - the brain purse is 1500 base before any PURSE multiplier
the shipped frontier/hall_cleared actionbar - the manager fires the exact same chain the old on_win did (same window as the purse wait; consecutive wait_chats share the cursor)
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win chain lands
new with the manager: the brain also gets a plain defeated_* tag alongside the cleared tag

steps.comment: -- beat 4: cleared-state dialog - Dahlia's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_arcade_cleared) preempts; prose any-of covers all three rotating say lines (the third is her folded ex-win_line) --

expect_screen_text: The house paid out. It almost never does - so wear it. The Arcade Star bows to exactly one player, and today that is you.

You broke the wheel and did not even flinch. I half-know that steadiness. I dealt cards to someone who moved like that, a long time ago, before the fall. I will keep my thoughts to myself - but well played.
The wheel stops on you. The house is out of spins - this hall is yours, Champion. There is no bigger jackpot on this floor.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario or the manager set (champion surgery + defeat ladder + hall clear + brain defeat) so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD purses ride (the prize rail has no reset, miller_walk precedent) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
